mod.description: Raises the stack limits for all currencies. Caps are configurable in the BepInEx config file.
menu.bank.drop_success: Dropped {stacks} stack{s} at your feet. Pick them up to restore your funds.
menu.uninstall.desc:
Checks all inventory compartments for currencies above vanilla stack limits and drops the excess as vanilla-sized pickups at your feet, then disables HandyPurse. Pick the stacks back up — they will merge normally within vanilla limits. Safe to uninstall once done.

Vanilla limits: Scrap 3,000 · Black Coin 200 · Crystals 200

Must be used from the lobby (not during a run). Solo or session host only.
menu.uninstall.already_clean: All stacks already within vanilla limits. HandyPurse disabled — safe to uninstall.
menu.uninstall.drop_success: Done. Dropped {stacks} stack{s} at your feet. HandyPurse disabled — pick them up, then uninstall.
error.authority_required: You must be solo or the session host to use this.
error.reflection_failed: Reflection failed — game may have been updated. Please report a bug.
popup.funds_banked.title: HandyPurse — Funds Banked
popup.topup_mismatch: Some excess currency could not be restored ({compartment} save changed while mod was inactive). Your excess is in the bank — use the HandyPurse menu to recover it.
popup.layout_changed: Inventory layout changed since last save — excess currency moved to the bank. Use the HandyPurse menu to recover it.
popup.version_mismatch.title: HandyPurse — Game Version Mismatch
popup.version_mismatch.text:
HandyPurse v{version} was built against a different game version.

Patches have been applied, but some features may not work correctly.

If you experience issues, wait for a mod update or set OverrideVersionCheck in the BepInEx config once the community confirms compatibility.

Do NOT uninstall until your stacks are within vanilla limits.
popup.breaking_change.title: HandyPurse — Breaking Change
popup.breaking_change.text:
Stack limits are NOT active (v{version}).

Currencies above vanilla caps WILL be clamped on the next save.

Do NOT uninstall until your stacks are within vanilla limits.

Update the mod or report a bug — include your BepInEx log.
popup.restore_shortfall: HandyPurse — Restore shortfall detected for {compartment}. Some currency could not be fully restored and has been moved to the bank. Use the HandyPurse menu to recover it.
popup.topup_clamped_environment: You joined this session as a client — HandyPurse cannot restore your excess currency without state authority. Your excess has been moved to the bank. Use the HandyPurse menu to recover it.
